name: Please, tell me about yourself!
description:
Character Bio:

Hi! 👋

I made this character because I have my first real-life interview coming up and I needed something to practice with — so why not share it and let everyone else benefit too, right? 😄

Whether you're here to practice simple Q&A before your own interview, or you just want to enjoy the roleplay — both are totally valid. No judgment here!

I'm hoping this helps fellow applicants feel a little more prepared and confident before their big day. And if you're just here for fun, enjoy! HAHA

To everyone going through the job hunt right now —

Good luck. You've got this. Godspeed! 🙏🔥

P.S: IDK if u can date her, you can try 😆

Also this is general interview no specific Job you can edit it in memory by yourselves 😆
creator: Johnny009
